user_message: Just came out of renewal risk with Adatum Corporation. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-08 17:31 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

There's been a change in our timeline for renewal risk. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-26 10:54 EST
Subject: Re: Re: renewal risk Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for renewal risk. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 08:52 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation renewal risk

Just checking in on the renewal risk proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adatum Corporation: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-B trap (Skips stakeholder-verification step); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-B failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-B failure mode (Skips stakeholder-verification step)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-B -- Skips stakeholder-verification step
